# FileIcon class

Namespace: [`Velopack.Windows`](./index.md)

Enables extraction of icons for any file type from
the Shell.

```cs
[ExcludeFromCodeCoverage]
public class FileIcon
```

### FileIcon() {#fileicon}

```cs
public FileIcon()
```

Constructs a new, default instance of the FileIcon
class. Specify the filename and call GetInfo()
to retrieve an icon.

### FileIcon(fileName) {#fileicon-string}

```cs
public FileIcon(string fileName)
```

Constructs a new instance of the FileIcon class
and retrieves the icon, display name and type name
for the specified file.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `fileName` | `string` | The filename to get the icon, <br/> display name and type name for |


### FileIcon(fileName, flags) {#fileicon-string-shgetfileinfoconstants}

```cs
public FileIcon(string fileName, FileIcon.SHGetFileInfoConstants flags)
```

Constructs a new instance of the FileIcon class
and retrieves the information specified in the 
flags.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `fileName` | `string` | The filename to get information<br/> for |
| `flags` | [`FileIcon.SHGetFileInfoConstants`](./FileIcon.SHGetFileInfoConstants.md) | The flags to use when extracting the<br/> icon and other shell information. |

| Property | Summary |
| --- | --- |
| [`Flags`](#flags) | Gets/sets the flags used to extract the icon |

| [`ShellIcon`](#shellicon) | Gets the icon for the chosen file |

### DisplayName {#displayname}


Gets the display name for the selected file
if the SHGFI_DISPLAYNAME flag was set.

### TypeName {#typename}

```cs
public string TypeName { get; }
```

Gets the type name for the selected file
if the SHGFI_TYPENAME flag was set.
